Author: mole99
Content:
@everyone Now that the shuttle is officially in production, we would like to celebrate with a casual video call. (Thanks @asic destroyer for the suggestion.) You can find the event here: https://discord.com/events/1361349522684510449/1464021932084170875
We look forward to seeing you there! 😃

Author: mole99
Content:
I'm planning to walk you through the reticle layout and answer any questions you have.
It would also be great to discuss your designs and chat about your experiences with the tapeout.

Author: mole99
Content: Finally, the public version of the reticle has been released! You can view all public projects here: https://github.com/wafer-space/ws-run1
